title: Data Missing Issue at SKH SMC Plant
desc: Data is missing for several hours, and on some days, the data is not pushed to the cloud at all.
remark: This issue has not been completely resolved yet. As per Ankush San's instruction, we have already sent a certification unblocking request to the SKH IT team. Currently, the data is visible and flowing properly; however, continuous monitoring during production is required for at least one week to confirm stability.

title: UI is not responding
desc: While checking Gas and Wire data in the Combi PLC, the UI becomes unresponsive and crashes unexpectedly.
remark: This issue was communicated to the development team and has now been resolved. However, continuous monitoring is still required for some time.

title: Missing Data
desc: In most of the widgets, data is missing during certain hours, such as 9–10 AM, 3–4 PM, or 8–10 PM. The issue is inconsistent.
remark: This issue was communicated to the development team and has now been resolved.

title: Shift Report Widget Issue
desc: Shift Report widget does not display data properly. It does not show all three shifts consistently.
remark: This issue was communicated to the development team and has now been resolved.

title: Production planning is not proper
desc: Production planning is not distributing properly across shift hours.
remark: This issue was communicated to the development team and has now been resolved.

title: Missing Data
desc: In most of the widgets, data is missing during certain hours, such as 9–10 AM, 3–4 PM, or 8–10 PM.
remark: This issue was communicated to the development team and has now been resolved.

title: Shift Report Irregularity
desc: Irregularity in the shift report section where production data for all shifts is not updating correctly.
remark: This issue was communicated to the development team and has now been resolved.

title: Machine Screen Data Delay (30s)
desc: While switching between machine screens, the system displays the previously viewed machine data for around 30 seconds.
remark: This issue was communicated to the development team. We will monitor for sometime.

title: Forget Password Not Working
desc: While monitoring widgets, data is fetching late — somewhere around 30 seconds.
remark: This issue was communicated to the devops team and has now been resolved.

title: Widgets UI Late Response
desc: While switching between machine screens, the system displays the previously viewed machine data for around 30 seconds.
remark: This issue was communicated to the development team and has not resolved.

title: Production plan is not creating
desc: While creating production plan it's showing an error " Column 'maintenance_type' of relation 'machine_production_plan' does not exist"
remark: Informed to development team, Sachine San is the stakeholder for the feature and resolution is going on - 02/06/2026. it's resolved by sachin san

title: Parameter analytics UI is not responding
desc: issue is with the parameter analytic widget. whenever we open process and machine parameters, screen does not resond
